nodes.name: Sitta
nodes.summary: Sitta（Sitta）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联29种鸟类，如喜山䴓、藏䴓、巨䴓等29种鸟类。

nodes.name: 阿爾及利亞鳾
nodes.summary: 阿尔及利亚鳾（學名：Sitta ledanti）是雀形目鳾科的鳥類，也是阿尔及利亚的特有種，最初发现于1973年，属于濒危动物。现在仅能見於該國海拔1000米以上人口密度低的地區。 外部链接 阿尔及利亚鳾
nodes.shortSummary: 阿尔及利亚鳾（學名：Sitta ledanti）是雀形目鳾科的鳥類，也是阿尔及利亚的特有種，最初发现于1973年，属于濒危动物。现在仅能見於該國海拔1000米以上人口密度低的地區。 外部链接 阿尔及利亚鳾

nodes.name: 阿爾及利亞鳾
nodes.summary: 阿爾及利亞鳾（Sitta ledanti）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如阿爾及利亞鳾。

nodes.name: 卡比利亚
nodes.summary: 卡比利亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括阿爾及利亞鳾，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 小种群风险
nodes.summary: 种群规模过小导致遗传多样性下降和脆弱性上升。

nodes.name: 阿尔及利亚

nodes.name: 动物界
nodes.summary: 动物界（Animalia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: EN
nodes.summary: EN表示 IUCN 濒危等级，当前关联384种鸟类，如朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭、黑脸琵鹭等384种鸟类。

nodes.name: 脊索动物门
nodes.summary: 脊索动物门（Chordata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 人类活动扰动
nodes.summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Kabyle nuthatch is the only bird species endemic to Algeria, where it now inhabits only certain coniferous and broadleaf forests in the Kabylia region in the north of the country

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits certain areas of Kabylia, where it has been recorded in five localities isolated from each other by deforested areas unsuitable for its survival. It was first discovered on Mount Babor, only about from the Mediterranean coast

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: When the Algerian nuthatch was discovered, ornithologists estimated that the species numbered only a dozen pairs and it was feared that "its rarity would attract collectors" and that the announcement of its discovery would cause its disappearance. The discovery in 1989 of the much larger population of the park of Taza shows that the species is less threatened than it seemed, and that its endemism is not limited to Babor Mountains. The current distribution of the Algerian nuthatch seems to be limited by that of the forests that support it, and the fragmentation of populations may indicate that the species was once more widespread, before deforestation isolated it in the small islands of greenery that it populates today. The Algerian nuthatch has a small population: its numbers may not exceed 1,000 individuals

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: When the Algerian nuthatch was discovered, ornithologists estimated that the species numbered only a dozen pairs and it was feared that "its rarity would attract collectors" and that the announcement of its discovery would cause its disappearance. The discovery in 1989 of the much larger population of the park of Taza shows that the species is less threatened than it seemed, and that its endemism is not limited to Babor Mountains. The current distribution of the Algerian nuthatch seems to be limited by that of the forests that support it, and the fragmentation of populations may indicate that the species was once more widespread, before deforestation isolated it in the small islands of greenery that it populates today. The Algerian nuthatch has a small population: its numbers may not exceed 1,000 individuals

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Cattle grazing and illegal deforestation (Mount Babor and Tamentout) are another threat to the habitat, even in Taza National Park. The construction of a motor road in the 1970s, which led to soil erosion and an increased risk of fire, or the fight against terrorism in the region, which is a source of disturbance for the species. The Algerian nuthatch may have several predators during incubation, such as the weasel (Mustela nivalis), the garden dormouse (Eliomys quercinus) and the great spotted woodpecker
